title: Closed form of the weighted geometric sum Σ k·2^k
statement_informal: The total depth-weighted work Σ_{k<n} k·2^k equals (n-2)·2^n + 2; stated in nat without subtraction as wsum n + 2·2^n = n·2^n + 2.

cost_model.notes: Σ k·2^k is the total work in a depth-weighted binary recursion: k units of work at each of the 2^k nodes on level k.

references: Verify-track twin of the Gosper antidifference certificate in tools/conjecture/results/closed-form-sum-k2k.json.
Petkovšek, Wilf, Zeilberger — A=B (Gosper/Zeilberger/WZ summation and certificates).
